NHANES.name: National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey (NHANES)
NHANES.description: A nationally representative survey that combines interviews, physical examinations, and laboratory measures in the U.S.

BRFSS.name: Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System (BRFSS)
BRFSS.description: A state-based telephone survey of health behaviors, risk factors, and preventive service use among U.S. adults.
BRFSS.geographic_coverage: United States (state and some local estimates)

CDC PLACES.name: CDC PLACES
CDC PLACES.description: Model-based local estimates for health outcomes, prevention, and health risk behaviors for counties, places, census tracts, and ZIP Code Tabulation Areas.
CDC PLACES.geographic_coverage: United States (county, place, census tract, ZCTA)

ACS (American Community Survey).name: American Community Survey (ACS)
ACS (American Community Survey).description: An ongoing U.S. Census Bureau survey providing annual estimates on demographic, social, economic, and housing characteristics.
ACS (American Community Survey).geographic_coverage: United States and Puerto Rico (multiple geographic levels)

Eviction Lab.name: Eviction Lab National Database
Eviction Lab.description: A longitudinal database of eviction filings and eviction rates with geographic detail across the United States.
Eviction Lab.geographic_coverage: United States (national, state, county, city where available)
Eviction Lab.temporal_coverage: Historical panel with ongoing updates (varies by location)
